description: Deterministic camera grammar for the pixel 2.5D episode renderer.

wide_establishing.description: Wide shot for location and layer readability.

push_in.description: Slow push toward a target for realization or clue emphasis.

tracking_side.description: Side-tracking camera for walking or stall-to-stall movement.

close_up.description: Close framing on a target face or small clue.

over_shoulder.description: Foreground shoulder framing to imply surveillance or pursuit.

reveal.description: Foreground wipe or parallax reveal for keys, doors, notes, and hidden clues.
